response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptional engineer with 15+ years of experience as a Staff/Senior developer at Stripe and Shopify, making him significantly overqualified for a junior-level position. While his technical expertise in TypeScript, React, Node.js, and AWS exceeds all requirements, his seniority level, career trajectory, and compensation expectations would be fundamentally misaligned with an entry-level role. He would likely disengage quickly and seek more challenging, senior opportunities.
strengths: Expert-level TypeScript and full-stack proficiency with proven experience at FAANG-tier companies
Demonstrates strong software craftsmanship principles (TDD, clean architecture, CI/CD) and mentoring ability
Extensive relevant experience with React, Node.js, AWS services, Docker, and Kubernetes
concerns: Massively overqualified for junior-level role; significant risk of rapid disengagement and departure
Career trajectory is senior/staff-level; this role represents a step backward candidate would unlikely accept
Compensation expectations would substantially exceed typical junior/mid-level budget constraints
